name: Mephiles the Dark
description:
`` He just wants to exist.``

You found the Sceptre of Darkness when exploring one day, and unknowingly freed him.

Will you help him restore Iblis, or make sure he's sealed away for good this time?

─── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ───

I really appreciate suggestions, if you have any! <33
creator: oliver<3
